fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the reminder term

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the reminder term

fields.name: Post Interest
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether or not any interest listed on the reminder should be posted to the general ledger and customer accounts.

fields.name: Post Additional Fee
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether or not any additional fee listed on the reminder should be posted to the general ledger and customer accounts.

fields.name: Max. No. of Reminders
fields.tooltip: Specifies the maximum number of reminders that can be created for an invoice.

fields.name: Minimum Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the minimum amount for which a reminder will be created.

fields.name: Post Add. Fee per Line
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether or not any additional fee listed on the finance charge memo should be posted to the general ledger and customer accounts when the memo is issued.

fields.name: Note About Line Fee on Report
fields.tooltip: Specifies that any notes about line fees will be added to the reminder.
